questions.question: Exponential backoff retries с 5 attempts, retry_delay=1min, max_retry_delay=1h. Какое максимальное total wait?

options.text: ~31 min: attempt 2 после 1 min, attempt 3 после 2 min (2× delay), attempt 4 после 4 min, attempt 5 после 8 min, attempt 6 после 16 min. Formula: delay_n = min(retry_delay × 2^(n-1), max_retry_delay)

questions.explanation: Exponential backoff: delay doubles each retry. С retry_delay=60s, max=3600s: 60, 120, 240, 480, 960 — total ~31 min для 5 retries. max_retry_delay caps это — без cap 6th retry would be 1920s, 7th 3840s, etc. Balance: enough time для transient issues resolve (network blips, DB failover), не infinite wait. Production tuning: short retry_delay (30s) для transient, longer (5-10 min) для rate-limited APIs.

questions.question: Task should retry on transient errors но НЕ retry на authentication failure. Как реализовать?

options.text: try/except + raise AirflowFailException для terminal errors (fails task immediately, no retries). Standard Exception triggers retry. AirflowSkipException — для data quality issues (skip rather than retry)

questions.explanation: AirflowFailException — explicit fail-fast. raise когда retry не поможет: auth failure, invalid input, schema mismatch. Без retries даже если retries=5. Standard Exception → retry если retries > 0 left. AirflowSkipException → marks task SKIPPED (downstream trigger_rule matters). Pattern: try/except, classify exception type, raise appropriate Airflow exception. Smart error handling vs blanket retries.

questions.question: on_failure_callback vs Listener API — main difference?

options.text: Callbacks — per-DAG/task. Listener API — global (все DAGs). Callbacks declared в DAG code. Listeners — plugin (single source of truth). Listener API лучше для cross-cutting concerns (alerting, audit). Callbacks для DAG-specific business logic

questions.explanation: Callbacks (on_failure_callback, on_success_callback) — declarative per-DAG. Good для DAG-specific cleanup. Listener API (модуль 12) — global hooks через AirflowPlugin. Single listener handles ALL DAGs' failure events. Production: alerting через Listener API (one place, consistent), DAG-specific logic через callbacks (resource cleanup, custom notification per business unit). Listener — newer (2.5+), more powerful, recommended для cross-cutting concerns.

questions.question: on_failure_callback runs синхронно в scheduler process — slow callback (5+ seconds) замедляет scheduler tick.
questions.explanation: Callbacks execute synchronously в scheduler process. Slow callback (slow HTTP к Slack, syscall, etc) блокирует scheduler loop — scheduler.scheduler_loop_duration spike, всех tasks scheduling замедляется. Production rule: callbacks fast (< 1 second), fire-and-forget где возможно. Wrap external HTTP в try/except + low timeout (2s). Для slow alerting work — use Listener API с asyncio capability, or pub/sub event к external alerting service вместо direct HTTP в callback.
